meta.summary: Public genealogy, cemetery, library, and social media resources verified against the Wixted family workbook.

categories.label: Cemetery & Burial Records
categories.description: Official burial indexes and memorial databases matching names in the family workbook.

categories.label: Obituaries & Newspapers
categories.description: Published death notices and funeral home records for Wixted family members.

categories.label: Genealogy Databases
categories.description: Collaborative trees, census records, and surname research for Wixted/Wicksted lines.

categories.label: Historical Context
categories.description: Railroad, colonial, and regional history connected to family notes.

categories.label: Irish & English Origins
categories.description: Research on the Lambeth/London and Tipperary/Limerick Wixted roots.

categories.label: Libraries & Local Archives
categories.description: County historians, historical societies, and library collections holding Wixted-area records.

categories.label: Photos & Scanned Documents
categories.description: Publicly hosted baptism records, census scans, headstone photos, and profile images.

resources.title: LA County Assessor — Property Records
resources.desc: Search ownership history for Rowland Heights properties (e.g. Anne & Eduardo Davalos, 18984 Barroso St).

resources.title: St. Elizabeth Ann Seton Catholic Church — Rowland Heights
resources.desc: Mass location for Joan Jeisi funeral (2014); Tracy family Whittier/Rowland Heights parish connections.

resources.title: Queen of Heaven Cemetery — Rowland Heights
resources.desc: Burial place of Joan Marie (Tracy) Jeisi (2014). Tracy family services in Rowland Heights/Whittier area.

resources.title: LA County Registrar — Marriage & Birth Records
resources.desc: Official source for Daniel & Mary Joan Wixted marriage (Jun 28 1986) and Tracy birth records.

resources.title: Whittier Vital Records Index (1888–1957)
resources.desc: WAGS abstracted births, marriages, deaths from Whittier newspapers — Whittier Public Library History Room.

resources.title: Whittier Area Genealogical Society (WAGS)
resources.desc: Local research assistance for Whittier and southeastern LA County families since 1981.

resources.title: Joan Marie (Tracy) Jeisi Obituary (2014)
resources.desc: White Emerson Mortuary, Whittier — confirms Tracy siblings Anne Davalos, Mary Wixted, and Bryan Tracy.

resources.title: FamilySearch — Oaxaca, Mexico Catholic Records
resources.desc: Marriage of Jesus Montez and Vincenta Rivera, 6 Dec 1895, Santa Maria Magdalena, Jaltepec — Amor/Mexican line.

resources.title: Ellis Island — SS Caronia Passenger Records
resources.desc: Search Ellis Island manifests for Jonas F. E. Jones arrival November 15, 1908 from Liverpool.

resources.title: Sacred Heart Cemetery — Hainesport, NJ
resources.desc: Burial place of John W., Sarah, and Thomas J. Wixted — Irish collateral line from workbook FromIRE sheet.

resources.title: Painted Hills — Holy Sepulchre Cemetery, Bath NY
resources.desc: Steuben County cemetery index from the family workbook. John & Hazel Wixted burials at Holy Sepulchre, Bath.

resources.title: Find a Grave — Wixted in New York
resources.desc: 509 memorial records for Wixted in NY, including Holy Sepulchre (Rochester), St Mary's (Corning), and Mechanicville.

resources.title: Mount Hope Cemetery Burial Search
resources.desc: University of Rochester index of 360,000+ burials at Mt Hope & Riverside — many Wixted workbook references point here.

resources.title: Steuben County Historian — Obituary Index (W)
resources.desc: Official county obituary index listing Wixted burials: John L (1993), Hazel M (1984), Margaret C (1984), Raymond J (1973), Vincent D (1977), Thomas A (1967).

resources.title: Holy Sepulchre Cemetery — Rochester Wixteds
resources.desc: Find a Grave memorials include Alice Wixted (1886–1918), Anna Wixted (1903–1907), Sr Adrian Wixted (1887–1964) at Holy Sepulchre, Rochester.

resources.title: Friends of Mount Hope — Free Lookups
resources.desc: Volunteer genealogical lookup service for Mount Hope Cemetery, Rochester. 10–14 day response.

resources.title: Kolleen N. Wixted Obituary (2017)
resources.desc: Full obituary — daughter of Rod & Karyl Wixted, sister Maura White, nieces Hannah & Molly White. Honeoye/Livonia, NY.

resources.title: Dougherty Funeral Home — Kolleen Wixted
resources.desc: Condolences and memorial page for Kolleen N. Wixted, Oct 23, 2017.

resources.title: Democrat and Chronicle — Rochester Archives
resources.desc: Historical Rochester newspaper archive. Wixted family census and death notices appear throughout the 1900s.

resources.title: WikiTree — Wixted Surname (342 profiles)
resources.desc: Free collaborative tree with scanned baptism records, marriage certs, census images, and Ellis Island documents uploaded by researchers.

resources.title: WikiTree — John Wixted 1815 Baptism (Tipperary)
resources.desc: Two scanned baptism images from Englishtown, Newport, Co. Tipperary — father William Wixted, mother Ellen Flynn.

resources.title: WikiTree — Ellen (Wixted) Duffy (1876–)
resources.desc: 4 scanned documents: NLI baptism record, 1900 Troy NY census page, 1905 Buffalo census household, and family photo ca. 1900.

resources.title: WikiTree — John Wixted (1874–1968, Limerick)
resources.desc: Birth record 1874, marriage to Mary Hickey 1903, and death certificate 1968 — all scanned from Irish civil registration.

resources.title: Thomas Wickstead & Mary Hogan Descendants
resources.desc: Research query matching workbook patriarch Thomas James Wixted (1796–1873) and Mary Hogan — children Henry b1826, Margaret b1838, James b1839.

resources.title: FamilySearch — Wixted Records
resources.desc: Free LDS genealogy archive with census, immigration, and vital records for Wixted/Wicksted families.

resources.title: Ancestry — Wixted Family History
resources.desc: 2,000+ census records, 429 military records. 24% of US Wixteds were in New York in 1880.

resources.title: Erie Railroad Employee Photo Index
resources.desc: Historical photos of Erie RR workers — relevant to John McGraw (Avon trackwalker) and Wixted railroad workers in Corning.

resources.title: Erie Railroad Magazine Master Index
resources.desc: Employee names, obituaries, and service records from Erie Railroad Magazine archives.

resources.title: Mayflower Society — Alden Line
resources.desc: Colonial descent research for the Mayflower branch (John Alden line) in the Gilbert workbook.

resources.title: Ireland Blacksmiths — Wixted, Tipperary
resources.desc: Thomas Wixted, blacksmith of Port Ryan/Newport, Co. Tipperary (1800s). Family trade passed to sons James and John.

resources.title: Mount Saint Lawrence Cemetery — Limerick Wixteds
resources.desc: Irish burial records for Wixted family in Limerick City, including William, Josephine, and John Wixted.

resources.title: Wixted Surname — Irish Origins
resources.desc: Surname established in Ireland since the 17th century, primarily County Tipperary. English habitational root from Wickstead/Wixted.

resources.title: Internet Archive — Cheshire Visitation Pedigrees (1613)
resources.desc: Scanned heraldic visitation records documenting Wicksted/Wixsted gentry of Cheshire — contextual origin of the surname before Ireland.

resources.title: National Archives of Ireland — 1911 Census (Tipperary Wixteds)
resources.desc: William Wixted household, Curraghduff, Killoscully, Co. Tipperary — sons John, daughters Annie & Margaret.

resources.title: Steuben County Historical Society — Bath NY
resources.desc: Genealogical records, census index, burial records, newspapers 1831–1960 on microfilm, probate abstracts 1790–1900. Family genealogy files on shelves 3–14.

resources.title: Steuben County Historian — Family Genealogy Files
resources.desc: Public-submitted family files with trees, letters, and newspaper clippings. Obituary index PDF and burial records. Phone: (607) 664-2199.

resources.title: Corning Painted Post Historical Society
resources.desc: Benjamin Patterson Inn museum — local Corning history, railroad era, and Steuben County research. Phone: (607) 937-5281.

resources.title: Southeast Steuben County Library — Local History
resources.desc: Area newspapers on microfiche from 1840s, HeritageQuest census access (1790–1940), and NYS Historic Newspapers for Painted Post region.

resources.title: NYS Historic Newspapers
resources.desc: 1.4M+ digitized NY newspaper pages — search for Wixted obituaries, Corning/Rochester mentions. Steuben: Painted Post Times, Wayland Advance.

resources.title: Rochester Genealogical Society
resources.desc: Monroe County research resources — cemetery lookups, vital records guidance, and local history for Rochester Wixted lines.

resources.title: St Mary's Cemetery — Corning Wixteds
resources.desc: Find a Grave memorials for Raymond J, Margaret C, and other Corning-area Wixted burials referenced in Steuben obituary index.

documentAssets.title: John Wixted Baptism Record (29 Jun 1815, Tipperary)
Ellen Wixtead Baptism Record (9 Jan 1876, Limerick)
Wixted & Duffy Household — 1905 NY State Census, Buffalo
John Wixtead Birth Record (1874, Murroe, Limerick)
John Wixted & Mary Hickey Marriage (27 Jul 1903, Limerick)

researchGaps: No public obituary found online for Bruce John Wixted (1933–1995, Rochester) — may require Newspapers.com or Democrat and Chronicle microfilm at SSCL.
Original Wixted Family v9.5 Excel workbook is not published online.
Matthew Wixted Flickr/LinkedIn profiles excluded per family preference.
No dedicated Wixted family Facebook group or public Instagram archive located.
Gravesite photos referenced in Gilbert/McGraw/Doane/Bursley workbook notes remain in private family research only.
nyheritage.org returned no Wixted-specific digital collections.
